RESTRUCTURE INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Keep the top matter: the intro sentence, the origin-tag legend ([EVO]/[MRF]/[LEG]/[LIVE]/[PR20]/[CI]), the known-issues.md pointer, and the "Current architecture" context paragraph (it already correctly describes the cyclic model — leave it).
2. Add a NEW section immediately after the "Current architecture" paragraph titled "## Recently shipped (verified 2026-07-20)". List the fully-DONE items there as a bullet list, each one line with its evidence: items 1, 2, 10, 18, 19. Remove those items from their old positions in the body.

5. Add a NEW near-term item flagged **[AUDIT-2026-07-20]** in the "Now" area, high priority, titled "Project delete guard": "SqliteProjectRepository.delete has no active-plan guard, unlike every sibling reference-repo delete (Agent/Model/Provider/Capability all raise ReferencedEntityInUseError). 8. Keep the existing terse voice and markdown structure. Do not invent new items beyond the Project-delete-guard one. Do not soften or delete the do-not-do list.

reason: codex exec workspace-write wraps every command in bubblewrap, which cannot create namespaces in this devcontainer (bwrap: No permissions to create new namespace); ALL file ops failed, zero changes — codex unusable for writes here. It fetched ROADMAP.md from GitHub main via MCP, revealing the working branch is STALE vs origin/main (missing PRs #33/#34/#35, which already restructured the roadmap). Escalating to coordinator + user decision on branch reconciliation.
